sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36666" key="e)calmi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξαλμίζω</orth>, <sense id="n36666.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deprive of saltness,</tr_> Bilabel <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ὀψαρτ.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
